answer.text:
Hi Helen,

Due to system limitation, bookings created using “Temp”  contract cannot apply for DA. Please request the DDS Team to directly amend or remove the generated charges.

Add DDS


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department
